raw_consumer_statement: My credit card information was used to make payments at a hotel on another state. I disputed the charge over 60 days ago. Citibank provided receipts of the transaction showing a name of another person that I do not know. I contacted Citibak stating that I was not the person on the transaction receipt and do not know who the person named in the receipt is. A person named XXXX XXXX is on all the receipts. I have never met nor do I presently know who this person is.
